task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time
applies to the issuance of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in question in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time
applies to the issuance of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in question in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Require a medical examination

conditions.condition: in respect of applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E, regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: in respect of applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E, regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination covering the medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed
applies to the renewal of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State in question in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Apply alternative measures instead of requiring a medical examination

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III, such as in the case of the appropriate assessment of eyesight for applicants for driving licences in accordance with Annex III, point 3

task.label: Require the applicant or holder of the driving licence to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Fill in a self-assessment form covering the medical conditions set out in Annex III

conditions.condition: when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence
if required by the Member State

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance

conditions.condition: to address non-compliance with the requirement to fill in a self-assessment form or for knowingly providing information in the self-assessment form that is incorrect or incomplete, or for failing to meet any requirement established in accordance with paragraph 3, point (b)

task.label: Apply the alternative measure under paragraph 3, point (b)

conditions.condition: in such a way that it allows the monitoring of fitness to drive during periods of administrative validity

task.label: Ensure that the applicant or holder of the driving licence undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: If, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the various alternative measures set out in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder of a driving licence is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III
prior to the Member States issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: If, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the various alternative measures set out in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder of a driving licence is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III
prior to the Member States issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve the knowledge of the health sector and of driving licence holders
Adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

conditions.condition: to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness to drive

task.label: Inform the Commission thereof

conditions.condition: If Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness to drive

task.label: Make the guidelines available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: If Member States adopt guidelines and inform the Commission

task.label: Develop public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Inform the Commission thereof

conditions.condition: If Member States develop public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Make the information available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: If Member States develop public awareness campaigns and inform the Commission

task.label: Set standards for the issuance or any subsequent renewal of driving licences that are stricter than those set out in Annex III
